title: The Invisible 9
overview: The Pumpkin Scissors unit gets help from an unexpected source in dealing with a group of rogue soldiers.

title: War Relief Unit
overview: Randel is officially inducted into the Pumpkin Scissors unit, just in time for Section III to have to deal with a Viscount who has been mistreating his subjects.

title: For That is a Precious Thing
overview: Pumpkin Scissors are sent to rebuild a tunnel, and convince reluctant villagers to join their cause.

title: The Cracking Portrait
overview: Having become distrustful of Randel, Martis begins investigating his past.

title: The Frivolous Men
overview: Martis and Oreldo investigate more about Randel while he is in the hospital.

title: A Fruitful Time
overview: Randel and Alice try to find the mother of an abandoned baby.

title: The Lead And The Follow
overview: Alice gets a day off to meet her fiance, and the rest of the Pumpkin Scissors must look for missing supplies.

title: Burning Snowfields
overview: The Pumpkin Scissors race to deliver vital supplies in a frozen wasteland.

title: Woman of the Morning Mist
overview: Ladies man Oreldo helps a desperate woman come to terms with her past.

title: Pumpkin and Scissors
overview: The meaning behind the Pumpkin Scissors' title is finally revealed as Stecchin explains its creation to Randel.

title: Quiet Movement
overview: Alice is kidnapped by a group of people who want her to reveal the military's secrets.

title: The Unseen Pain
overview: Alice agrees to cooperate with her kidnappers and is released; little do they know what someone has in store for them.

title: Rough, but Delicious
overview: Martis meets with a foreign princess.

title: The Flame Still Burns
overview: Pumpkin Scissors must deal with drug dealers while moving homeless people from the sewers.

title: The Decision To Stray
overview: Pumpkin Scissors continues to fight the drug dealers, and their situation is complicated by a person with a flamethrower.

title: The One Who Tears to Pieces
overview: Alice must unleash her special weapon to finish the fight against the drug dealers.

title: The Yet Unrescued Darkness
overview: Alice fights the Claymores while Randel fights Hans.

title: Small War Potential
overview: Stecchin attempts to cheer up Randel, who has been depressed since the last mission.

title: Trick in Treat
overview: Alice goes to a ball with her sisters while the rest of Pumpkin Scissors gives rations out to the homeless.

title: Enter the Performers
overview: The ball is invaded by an angry mob.

title: The Puppet and the Idol
overview: Marquis sends his two bodyguards at Alice when she challenges him to a duel.

title: The Isolated Scales
overview: Alice must deal with the mob and her opponents, and Randel again looks for a reason to fight.

title: And Then There Was a Sweet Trap
overview: Everyone witnesses Alice's duel, and the military prepares to raid the mansion.

title: Soldiers, Commoners, Nobles
overview: Pumpkin Scissors is quickly running out of time to find a solution before the mansion is attacked.
